mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in real activity demand raises expected corporate revenues; when RSAFS growth is positive, S&P 500 forward 20-day returns should be positive because earnings revisions dominate discount-rate pressure.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value was 620214 for 2021-05-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than the unconditional base rate over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above 4%, equity investors price faster future policy tightening and lower real valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward 20-day returns.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value was 270.981 for 2021-06-01 at the decision date
regime_hint: inflation overshoot with policy normalization risk
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more than 60% of the time or if their mean return is not below non-triggered observations at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A falling UNRATE over the prior 3 months signals improving household income and lower recession risk; this labor-market improvement produces positive S&P 500 forward 60-day returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE declines by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value was 5.9 for 2021-06-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE declines of at least 0.3pp with nonnegative PAYEMS growth are not followed by above-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 6-month momentum in INDPRO signals rising production volumes and operating leverage; this supply expansion produces positive S&P 500 forward 20-day returns.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value was 100.0951 for 2021-06-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO 6-month momentum has a walk-forward Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day returns in every rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in HOUST signals weakening interest-rate-sensitive demand and future construction income; when starts fall materially, S&P 500 forward 60-day returns should be negative.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls by more than 10% over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value was 1572.0 for 2021-05-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST declines greater than 10% over 3 months are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: High CPIAUCSL inflation combined with FEDFUNDS pinned near zero creates negative real policy rates and future tightening risk; this interaction compresses equity multiples and produces negative 60-day returns.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.08 for 2021-06-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation low-rate state does not have lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than either single condition alone in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Weak PAYEMS growth with a rising UNRATE signals deteriorating labor income and recession-risk repricing; this joint labor deterioration produces negative S&P 500 forward 5-day returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change < 0 and UNRATE rises by at least 0.2 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value was 145759.0 for 2021-06-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor deterioration is followed by nonnegative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 50% of cases after transaction-date walk-forward alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth above its 1-year trend confirms broad demand recovery; when GDPC1 growth is accelerating, equity cash-flow expectations rise and S&P 500 forward 60-day returns should be positive.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses above its trailing 4-quarter average
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value was 19086.375 for 2021-01-01 at the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 acceleration triggers produce a 60-day S&P 500 mean return that is not statistically above the unconditional mean at p < 0.10.
